web.title: iPhone Viewport Sizes 2026: CSS Pixels, DPR & Resolution Chart
web.description: Find the CSS width and height, DPR, physical resolution, and model year for each iPhone model, including iPhone 17, 16, 15, SE, Pro, and Pro Max. Use the chart for responsive breakpoints, QA checks, and device-specific layout tests. ... Method: iPhone and iPad values are mainly resolution divided by DPR. Android CSS viewport and DPR can vary by display scaling, browser UI, and system settings.

web.title: Viewport Size for iPhone / Device-width for Apple iPhones / CSS Media Queries for iPhone | YesViz
web.description: To keep web content at readable sizes, iOS applies a device pixel ratio (DPR) of 2.0 or 3.0 — scaling down the native screen resolution to a smaller, logical CSS pixel grid. For example, an iPhone with a 1179 × 2556 screen resolution and a DPR of 3.0 has a viewport of 393 × 852 CSS pixels.

web.title: Apple iPhone 17 Simulator & Emulator — Viewport, Resolution & CSS Specs | Phone Simulator
web.description: Apple iPhone 17 simulator and emulator for Chrome. Test exact viewport (402×874px), DPR 3x & CSS specs. Free — no device needed.
